                      +------------------------------------------+
                      |  Core Logic                              |
                      |                                          |
+---------------+     |  +-------------+        +-------------+  |     +--------------+
|  Entry Point  +-----o->|  Process A  +------->|  Process B  +--o---->|  Exit Point  |
+---------------+     |  +-------------+        +-------------+  |     +--------------+
                      |                                          |
                      |                                          |
                      +------------------------------------------+
